RCU E95

OBD Information

Protocol: CAN
Send ID: 74B
Recv ID: 76B
Baudrate: 125000
Func Addr: 1C
Func Name: Pilotage capote

Auto IDents

[
  {
    "diagversion": "4",
    "supplier": "330",
    "soft": "0921",
    "version": "0007"
  }
]
